spans.text: the sick and poor from clime
a mingled cry and dying prayer
the listening midnight air , When deep dismay
Amid the sad sights of that fearful scene
Amid the sad sights of that fearful scene
the cold earth holds his only friend
The saddest plaints ever told to human ear
from his face retire in dark array
On the black waves , like promontories hung , A light , as of the orient morn
the awful blast Of the archangel's trump
Relentless Time , that steals with silent tread
The feeble characters of Glory's hand
Pale on thy grave shall drop his faltering spear
no more To bathe his burning falchion deep in gore
that fairer hence may rise New views of life
the place , Where sleeps the general friend of human race
sleeps the general friend of human race
the general friend of human race
their children what a debt they owe
of the man who trodden the paths of woe
who trodden the paths of woe
who trodden the paths of woe
to those shores they haply steer
And the relenting Pagan turn aside To
the wild Nieper's banks , and whispering reeds , Over Howard's grave thou shalt impassioned bend , As if to hold sad converse with a friend
that oft unbidden start , Think upon him to every lot resigned , Who wept , who toiled , and perished for mankind
to the wild Nieper's wave , Sigh to the reeds that whisper over thy grave
